product.name: Business Control
product.subtitle: Local-first control plane for repo-backed businesses

businesses.name: Shade Diary
businesses.subtitle: A mobile launch lane with Design Room, Launch Cockpit, onboarding proof, App Store tasks, attribution, and retention work in one local workspace.

agents.name: Design Room scout
agents.summary: Audits state, theme tokens, screenshots, and visual proof.

agents.name: Store Ops auditor
agents.summary: Checks App Store evidence, What to Test, screenshots, and release notes.

agents.name: Continuity sentinel
agents.summary: Compares handoff, current state, git, and installed runtime before work starts.

agents.name: Revenue analyst
agents.summary: Reviews pricing, RevenueCat state, provider proof, and paywall claims.

lanes.title: Design Room
lanes.summary: Review product, market, audience, promise, screenshots, and visual direction from state files.

lanes.title: Launch Cockpit
lanes.summary: See launch stage, blockers, milestones, provider proof, and next agent actions.

lanes.title: Store Ops
lanes.summary: Inspect ASC metadata, screenshots, TestFlight notes, and release-readiness proof.

lanes.title: Growth
lanes.summary: Review viral loops, referral assets, paid UA notes, and source freshness.

lanes.title: Analytics
lanes.summary: Check PostHog event contract, attribution status, retention events, and red/yellow gates.

lanes.title: Failure Cards
lanes.summary: Known misses and eval-backed regressions future agents should avoid.

businesses.name: Ocho
businesses.subtitle: A focused app-control workspace for app audit findings, native build status, RevenueCat state, onboarding, and launch follow-through.

agents.name: Native app auditor
agents.summary: Walks the real target-user flow before making code claims.

agents.name: Revenue proof scout
agents.summary: Checks entitlement, paywall, and provider handoff status.

agents.name: Build release runner
agents.summary: Keeps build numbers, simulator proof, and ASC state aligned.

agents.name: Continuity sentinel
agents.summary: Blocks stale handoff assumptions before resuming work.

lanes.title: Experience Audit
lanes.summary: Target-user walkthrough, onboarding gaps, AI-stack flow, and release risks.

lanes.title: Native Build
lanes.summary: Xcode generation, build number, simulator, and TestFlight proof.

lanes.title: Revenue
lanes.summary: RevenueCat entitlement checks and paywall alignment.

lanes.title: Store Ops
lanes.summary: ASC validation, What to Test, screenshots, and metadata.

lanes.title: Analytics
lanes.summary: Activation and retention events for the first real cohort.

lanes.title: Failure Cards
lanes.summary: Known launch regressions and proof expectations.

businesses.name: Clueless Creations
businesses.subtitle: A private workspace and public website split with business routes, artifact registry, custom-domain hardening, and local sync.

agents.name: Workspace architect
agents.summary: Reviews business routes, private workspace, and artifact registry.

agents.name: Security hardener
agents.summary: Checks Worker routing, public config, and domain boundaries.

agents.name: Artifact sync runner
agents.summary: Moves local deliverables into durable storage with proof.

agents.name: Continuity sentinel
agents.summary: Prevents public site and private workspace drift.

lanes.summary: Private business routes, control plane, and authenticated surfaces.
